blocks.body: Past Continuous: Forms and Use — was / were + verb-ing for actions in progress in the past.

{"level":"A2","intro":"In Past Continuous, we use was / were + verb-ing for actions that were in progress at a point in the past.","rules":[{"label":"was / were + verb-ing","color":"emerald","text":"This tense uses the past form of be and a verb with -ing.","example":"I was reading. / They were waiting."},{"label":"Moment in the past","color":"blue","text":"The tense often shows an action at a specific moment in the past.","example":"We were studying at 8 p.m."},{"label":"Background action","color":"amber","text":"Use it as the background for another event.","example":"She was cooking when I called."}]}

{"title":"1. Basic formula","intro":"Remember the form for each group of subjects.","items":[{"label":"I / He / She / It","title":"was + verb-ing","subtitle":"I was reading. / He was sleeping. / It was raining."},{"label":"You / We / They","title":"were + verb-ing","subtitle":"You were listening. / We were waiting. / They were coming."},{"label":"Spelling","title":"write → writing / run → running","subtitle":"The -ing form works the same way as in Present Continuous."},{"label":"Time point","title":"at 7 p.m. / at that moment","subtitle":"These expressions often appear with Past Continuous."}]}

{"title":"2. When we use Past Continuous","sections":[{"label":"Action at a past moment","color":"emerald","description":"Show that an action was in progress at a certain moment in the past.","examples":[{"en":"I was doing my homework at 9 o'clock.","ua":"An action in progress at that time."},{"en":"They were sleeping at midnight.","ua":"The action was still happening then."}]},{"label":"Background for an event","color":"blue","description":"One action was in progress when another short event happened.","examples":[{"en":"She was reading when the phone rang.","ua":"The call interrupted the action."},{"en":"We were walking when it started to snow.","ua":"One action was in progress, then another happened."}]},{"label":"Temporary past activity","color":"amber","description":"Show an activity that continued for some time in the past.","examples":[{"en":"He was working all evening.","ua":"A longer past activity."},{"en":"I was staying with my cousin that week.","ua":"A temporary past situation."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Quick form check","intro":"One model with was / were and -ing for all subjects.","rows":[{"en":"I was writing an email.","ua":"was + writing","note":"I + was + verb-ing"},{"en":"She was watching TV.","ua":"was + watching","note":"she + was + verb-ing"},{"en":"We were waiting outside.","ua":"were + waiting","note":"we + were + verb-ing"},{"en":"They were coming home.","ua":"were + coming","note":"they + were + verb-ing"}],"warning":"Do not say I was read or They was waiting."}

{"title":"4. Common mistakes","items":[{"label":"Mistake 1","color":"rose","title":"Using the base form instead of -ing.","wrong":"❌ I was read a book.","right":"✅ I was reading a book."},{"label":"Mistake 2","color":"amber","title":"Using was with they / we / you.","wrong":"❌ They was waiting for us.","right":"✅ They were waiting for us."},{"label":"Mistake 3","color":"sky","title":"Leaving out be in the past.","wrong":"❌ She cooking when I came in.","right":"✅ She was cooking when I came in."}]}

{"title":"5. Short summary","items":["Past Continuous = was / were + verb-ing.","Use was with I / he / she / it.","Use were with you / we / they.","This tense is used for actions in progress at a point in the past.","It often works as the background for another short event."]}
